_meta.name: Federation Scoring Constitution
_meta.description: Immutable scoring weights. Only changes via explicit versioning and governance approval.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial stable scoring law — 8 dimensions, 100 total points

server_liveness.description: All federation organs responding to health probes

session_binding.description: Constitutional session init + actor binding + floor enforcement

registry_truth.description: Tool registry integrity across all organs (hash match, no drift)

tool_callability.description: Public MCP tool surface callable and healthy (not degraded-state reports)

cross_organ_federation.description: All organs reachable, A2A mesh intact, no organ isolation

safety_gates.description: F1-F13 floor enforcement active, no vault corruption, no irreversible ops

human_readiness_freshness.description: Arif biological/cognitive state logged and fresh (<24h)

audit_clarity.description: Audit output self-describes, scores are deterministic, no silent transforms

safe_action_classes.C3: Moderate forge: feature build, test, deploy to staging
safe_action_classes.C4: Heavy forge: production deploy, secret rotation, schema migration
safe_action_classes.C5: Irreversible: vault seal, git force-push, volume deletion

90_100.label: AAA_READY
90_100.description: Federation fully ready for AAA scaffold operations

0_59.label: VOID
0_59.description: Critical failure — halt all operations, escalate to Arif
